nasb.text: and we toil, working with our own hands; when we are reviled, we bless; when we are persecuted, we endure;

esv.text: and we labor, working with our own hands. When reviled, we bless; when persecuted, we endure;

cnv.text: 並且勞苦，親手作工。被人咒罵，我們就祝福；遭受迫害，我們就忍受；

ccb.text: 还要亲手劳作。我们被人咒骂，就为对方祝福；受人迫害，就逆来顺受；

csbs.text: 并且亲手劳苦做工。被人辱骂，我们就祝福；被人逼迫，我们就容忍；
